program.name: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
program.description: A comprehensive four-year degree designed to build world-class computer scientists through theoretical foundations and practical software engineering skills.

subjects.name: Programming Fundamentals
subjects.description: Learn C++, Java, and Python syntax, control structures, functions, and object-oriented programming concepts.

subjects.name: Data Structures
subjects.description: Arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, trees, graphs, hash tables, and their real-world applications.

subjects.name: Algorithms
subjects.description: Sorting, searching, dynamic programming, greedy algorithms, graph algorithms, and complexity analysis.

subjects.name: Database Systems
subjects.description: Relational models, SQL, normalization, transactions, indexing, NoSQL databases, and data warehousing.

subjects.name: Artificial Intelligence
subjects.description: Search algorithms, knowledge representation, planning, NLP fundamentals, and expert systems.

subjects.name: Web Development
subjects.description: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, React, Node.js, REST APIs, responsive design, and deployment strategies.

subjects.name: Computer Networks
subjects.description: OSI model, TCP/IP, routing, switching, wireless networks, network security, and cloud networking.

subjects.name: Cybersecurity
subjects.description: Cryptography, ethical hacking, penetration testing, secure coding, threat analysis, and compliance.

subjects.name: Software Engineering
subjects.description: SDLC, Agile, Scrum, design patterns, testing, CI/CD, requirements engineering, and project management.

subjects.name: Operating Systems
subjects.description: Process management, memory management, file systems, concurrency, virtualization, and Linux internals.

subjects.name: Machine Learning
subjects.description: Supervised/unsupervised learning, neural networks, deep learning, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and model deployment.

subjects.name: Cloud Computing
subjects.description: AWS/Azure/GCP, serverless architecture, microservices, containers, Docker, Kubernetes, and DevOps.

careers.title: Web Developer
careers.description: Build modern, responsive, and scalable web applications using cutting-edge frameworks.

careers.title: Software Engineer
careers.description: Design and develop robust software systems for enterprise and consumer products.

careers.title: AI Engineer
careers.description: Develop intelligent systems, NLP models, computer vision, and autonomous agents.

careers.title: Data Scientist
careers.description: Analyze complex datasets, build predictive models, and extract actionable insights.

careers.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
careers.description: Protect organizations from cyber threats, conduct audits, and build secure systems.

careers.title: Cloud Engineer
careers.description: Architect, deploy, and manage cloud infrastructure on AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

careers.title: UI/UX Designer
careers.description: Create intuitive user experiences, wireframes, prototypes, and design systems.

careers.title: Freelancer
careers.description: Work independently on diverse projects across the globe with flexible schedules.

resources.title: Programming Notes
resources.description: Complete C++, Java, and Python programming guides with examples.

resources.title: Data Structures
resources.description: Visual explanations of arrays, trees, graphs, and algorithm analysis.

resources.title: Database Guide
resources.description: SQL reference, normalization rules, and ER diagram tutorials.

resources.title: Web Dev Handbook
resources.description: Frontend and backend development cheatsheets and best practices.

resources.title: AI & ML Notes
resources.description: Machine learning algorithms, neural networks, and deep learning basics.

resources.title: Cybersecurity
resources.description: Security fundamentals, cryptography, and ethical hacking basics.

testimonials.name: Ahmed Khan
testimonials.text: The BSCS program completely transformed my career trajectory. The practical projects and AI specialization helped me land a role at a top tech company within months of graduation.

testimonials.name: Fatima Ali
testimonials.text: The curriculum is exceptionally well-designed. From data structures to machine learning, every course built upon the last. I felt prepared for real-world challenges from day one.

testimonials.name: Omar Hassan
testimonials.text: What sets this program apart is the focus on hands-on learning. The project-based approach and industry mentorship gave me the confidence to launch my own startup.

testimonials.name: Sana Malik
testimonials.text: The cybersecurity track was intense and incredibly rewarding. The professors are industry veterans who bring real-world scenarios into every lecture.
